calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael Freedman for Ramona Lopez & Martha Guerrero (Petitioners). Paul Perdue for Tricia Guerrero & Christina Guerrero (Objectors).

The Court addressed the petition. Mr. Perdue stated that Fernando had intended to pass on his interest to his daughters, and that the parents had held the property in a constructive trust. The Court addressed the objection, stated that Fernando deeded the property back to his parents and that even if the deed is thrown out that the prior deed was held in joint tenancy so the objectors would be no better off. Mr. Perdue questioned if that is what Fernando wanted. The Court countered by questioning if there is anything in writing in support of their position, and addressed joint tenancy. Mr. Perdue conceded that there is no evidence, that an 850 petition should have been filed, and stated that he was here to articulate for Mr. Katz what "he" intended to do. The Court then granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Mr. Freedman submitted a new proposed order in open court.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. Matter Not Reported.
